---
title: "EU Cohesion Policy under the Media Spotlight: Exploring Territorial and Temporal Patterns in News Coverage and Tone"
author: "Mendez, C., Mendez, F., Triga, V. and Carrascosa, J. M."
date: 2020-01-01
description: "Journal of Common Market Studies. doi: 10.1111/jcms.13016"
categories:
  [Media and Social Media Monitoring, Public Opinion and Argument Mining]
image: images_publications/visibility-jcms.png
---
